headlines.h: Opinion: Happy Friday 13th all (And You Know It)
headlines.b: Experts urge humans to stop taking it personally and start providing snacks.
Treat futures up. Productivity down. The couch remains occupied.
Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.

headlines.h: Exclusive: Government Announces New Standard: “main character energy haha"
headlines.b: Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).
